description_long: This is a small, ornate wooden chest of drawers with a rectangular body and a stepped, tiered lid. The chest is supported by four sculpted feet resembling animal paws or stylized creatures, adding a whimsical touch. The front panel features intricate inlaid designs, including a central scene with a seated figure and foliage, while the back panel displays a deer motif flanked by leaf inlays. The side panels are decorated with painted fruit motifs and have metal ring handles for carrying. The wood has a rich, dark finish, and the chest appears to be crafted with attention to detail, including decorative corner brackets and a visible keyhole on the front. This object would likely serve as a decorative storage piece in an urban park, garden, or public square.
description: A small, dark wooden chest of drawers with ornate animal feet, inlaid and painted decorations, and metal ring handles on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main inlaid scene with a seated figure, foliage, a keyhole, and two animal-like feet.
description_view_1: Side view displaying painted yellow fruit motifs and a metal ring handle, with two animal feet visible.
description_view_2: Back view featuring a central deer inlay, two vertical metal brackets, and animal feet at the corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with painted orange fruit motifs and a metal ring handle, similar to the other side.
